Motion For Leave To Amend Their First Amended Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-29-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorneys Michael Hanna and Thomas Chaffee of Morris Polich & Purdy LLP 415-984-8534 for Defendants Anthony and Mandy Kwong the moving party.

Attorney Terrence J. Brasch of Bishop Barry 510-596-0888 for Plaintiff GF Construction Co. Inc., A California Corporation the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of DEFENDANTs ANTHONY KWONG and MANDY KWONG's Motion For Leave To Amend Their First Amended Cross-Complaint; The Court rules as follows: The Court takes this matter under submission. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-19-2015 Continued To May-09-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion For An Order Permitting Destructive Testing To Occur Nothwithstanding The Expiration Of The Fact Discovery Cutoff, Or In The Alternative, To Reopen Fact Discovery For The Purpose Of Destructive Testing
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ike Kaludi, Jr. telephone number 510-559-0320 specially appearing for Plaintiff.
Michael Hanna of Morris Polich & Purdy LLP telephone number 415-984-8521 for Defendants.

Both Counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, DEFENDANT ANTHONY KWONG, MANDY KWONG'S Motion For An Order Permitting Destructive Testing To Occur Nothwithstanding The Expiration Of The Fact Discovery Cutoff is granted. Defendant's Motion to Re-open Fact Discovery is denied without prejudice to either Party if the destructive testing results in an expansion of Defendant/Cross-Complainant's claims. Sanctions in the amount of $1,500.00 are imposed against Plaintiff. Order signed in open Court.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
